nodes.grounding_span: I don't think I'd mind as much if it were ethically sourced

nodes.label: AI for administrative vs creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I try to keep it separate from my creative work

nodes.grounding_span: I do enjoy brainstorming with it

nodes.grounding_span: I just wish there was more transparency

nodes.label: Creative integrity and personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: Art takes a lot of time, effort, and education. It's a culmination of everything I am

nodes.grounding_span: actively taking other artists' work without permission and compensation

nodes.label: Human autonomy and meaningful work
nodes.grounding_span: free up time so that people can work less and enjoy things more

nodes.grounding_span: I do appreciate AI as a tool. It's saved me time

nodes.grounding_span: I don't like the way AI is being used to generate images

nodes.label: Ambivalent tension about AI ethics
nodes.grounding_span: I do feel tension about it, absolutely. The ethics can be tricky!

nodes.label: Positive view of AI for menial tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Please, take the menial stuff off of our hands

nodes.grounding_span: I try to keep it separate from my creative work
